title: alpinia glabra
intro: Alpinia glabra, also known as Lesser Galangal, is a type of rhizomatous perennial plant in the ginger family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Alpinia glabra are attributed to its ability to aid digestion, relieve nausea and vomiting, and reduce fever, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Alpinia glabra can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
